title: Spicy Kielbasa Burger
description: A spicy twist on a classic burger, featuring kielbasa sausage and a portuguese-inspired seasoning.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together portuguese seasoning and a pinch of salt and pepper.
3. Add the seasonings to the kielbasa sausage and toss to coat.
4. Grill the kielbasa sausage for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the burger buns on the grill or in a toaster.
6. Assemble the burgers by spreading spicy ketchup on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked kielbasa sausage, shredded lettuce, sliced onions, sliced tomatoes, and a dollop of mayonnaise.
9. Optional: serve with additional toppings such as sliced jalapeños or pickles.
10. Optional: serve with a side of spicy chips or fries.
